message:
✨ Add instant loading page on backend startup (#821)

The Go backend now starts a temporary loading page server immediately
on the configured port, before doing any heavy initialization (DB, k8s,
MCP, AI providers). Users see a styled "Starting up..." page instead
of "connection refused" while services initialize. The loading page
auto-refreshes when the backend is ready.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
